response.justification: While Bogdan exceeds the minimum 15-year requirement with 20 years of engineering experience and demonstrates strong technical leadership across multiple platforms, he lacks the critical preferred qualifications that define this role. He has no formal AI/ML expertise or advanced degree in an AI field, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, and his entry into AI-agent infrastructure is extremely recent (1.5 months). The resume shows scattered technical breadth rather than deep strategic expertise in cloud and AI platforms expected at principal engineer/director level.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience minimum with 20 years across software, infrastructure, and platform development
Demonstrates strong technical leadership with staff positions and ability to architect systems (GISCollective, MCP frameworks, microservices infrastructure)
Proven ability to mentor and share knowledge through workshops, talks, and significant open-source contributions
concerns: No formal AI/ML background or advanced degree in AI-related field, despite role's emphasis on AI strategy and expertise
Zero demonstrated AI products or platforms; recent AI-agent infrastructure work (1.5 months) insufficient to establish recognized AI expertise
Career breadth across diverse technologies and domains without clear strategic direction in cloud/AI platforms expected at director level

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise gap and product portfolio
